action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline heuristic scored 0.5612 with success_rate=0.8533. Failed episodes (15%) contribute 0 score - this is the main bottleneck. Local test on 15 maps showed 100% success, so the heuristic works on easy maps but fails on harder ones. Analysis: Need to understand why the planner fails on some maps (likely gets stuck or runs out of steps). Decision: First read current code, then improve the planner with better frontier handling, backtracking, and pathfinding to increase success rate.
